account.title: My account
account.reviewNotice: Changing your business name, business type, or crops needs a quick review before it shows on Urimalu again. Your other details save right away.

account.saveError: Could not save your changes. Please try again
account.rlsBlocked: This update was blocked. Please try again or contact support
account.adminNote: Admin accounts are managed from the admin panel.

pending.title: Registration submitted
pending.timeline: If an admin has not reviewed your account within 24 hours, it is approved automatically. You will be able to access your dashboard once approved.
pending.prepare1: Today's EP rate for Robusta Cherry
pending.prepare4: Your delivery points and contact persons
